title: EcoBag - 50 Pack Heavy Duty Bin Bags - 50L - 35 Microns - Recyclable Black Bin Bag with Leak Resistant Seal, Sustainable Refuse Sack, Eco-Friendly Rubbish Bag for Home, Office & Kitchen (600x800 mm)
features: Extra Strong and Durable: Crafted to withstand heavy loads, our bin bags are made from robust materials, ensuring they won't tear or puncture easily. These strong black bin bags are perfect for disposing of heavy or sharp waste, making them an essential for any waste disposal need.

Leak Resistant Design: Engineered with superior leak resistance, these bin liners effectively prevent unwanted spills and leaks. Whether you're dealing with wet or sharp waste, these heavy-duty bin bags will keep your bins clean and mess-free

Eco-Friendly and Recyclable: Made from 100% recyclable materials, our bin bags support eco-friendly practices. Choosing these black bags not only ensures efficient waste management but also helps minimise your carbon footprint.

Perfect Fit for 100L Bins: With dimensions of 600 x 800mm, these bin bags are designed to fit 100L wheelie bins perfectly. Their versatile size makes them ideal for various waste disposal needs, providing a reliable and convenient solution for your bin storage

Convenient Bulk Packaging: Each pack includes 50 heavy-duty refuse sacks, ensuring you have a substantial supply for continuous use. This bulk packaging offers great value and convenience, making these garbage bags an economical choice for any household or commercial setting.
description: From the manufacturer HB001 - 50 HEAVY DUTY REFUSE SACKS 50LITRE 50 Heavy Duty Refuse Sacks Extra Strong This bag is a 50litre 140 gauge bag which is perfect for all your general house waste. Made with an extra leak resistant seal to help prevent leakage. *FOR AUTHENTICITY PLEASE PURCHASE VIA 'DISPATCHED BY AMAZON'* Size 600mm x 800mm (50 litre) refuse sack I used to be rubbish These bags are made from a minimum of 98% recycled plastic & are 100% recyclable. Doing our bit to help Making these bags from recycled plastic will help to prevent some plastic going to landfill sites.
